name: O-7 per-rule canary: --emit-audit <path> appends a rule-state-change JSONL entry for the rule transition
command: mkdir -p tree rubric/fp-log && : > rubric/fp-log/g-ts-test.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/canary-promote.sh" --rule-id g-ts-test --to block --tree "$PWD/tree" --now 2026-05-30T00:00:00Z --emit-audit "$PWD/audit.jsonl" 2>/dev/null && grep -q 'rule-state-change' audit.jsonl && grep -q 'g-ts-test' audit.jsonl && echo audited 1>&2
